untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of high-impact economic calendar events (NFP, CPI, FOMC releases) which are external fundamental news events not representable by technical indicators. Also requires pre-event planning logic and 10-15 second post-release reaction confirmation timing, which are execution/timing primitives outside the scope of indicator-based rule conditions. The core alpha capture mechanism (being first to trade new information) cannot be expressed using only price/volume technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an event-driven news trading strategy that depends on: (1) external calendar data feeds, (2) pre-trade planning execution logic, and (3) precise sub-minute timing around news releases. While volume confirmation was attempted as a proxy for post-event volatility, the actual entry trigger is the news event itself, not a technical condition. This requires a custom event-handling framework rather than indicator-based rules.
